name: mask_is_zero
reason: A zero mask would erase all address bits, making address translation completely non-functional

name: lower_twelve_bits_leak
reason: Lower 12 bits represent the page offset and must be zero in the address mask; nonzero would corrupt page-aligned addresses

name: mask_all_ones
reason: An all-ones mask would pass through non-physical high bits, defeating the purpose of physical address masking

name: bit12_not_set
reason: Bit 12 is the lowest physical-frame bit and must be included in the mask; excluding it would truncate valid frame addresses

name: exceeds_max_phyaddr
reason: Bits 52–63 exceed the maximum 52-bit physical address width; if set, the mask would accept non-existent physical addresses
